examples: Traffic was chaotic during rush hour.
Moving to a new city can be chaotic.
context: So I didn't want to keep it if it was broken. So on this already busy chaotic day, my husband needed to go to a department store to try and buy a new suitcase.

examples: It's been a hectic week at work.
context: This past week was especially hectic because it was my last week in Korea. I thought I was prepared but then it came up so quickly and I had so much to do before coming to the U.S. So I was very busy.

examples: She looked stunning at the event.
The building has a stunning design.
context: My brother-in-law looked very handsome and the bride of course was stunning. I couldn't be happier for them.
